description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a smooth, purple base and a glossy, dark chocolate ganache drip covering the top and running down the sides. The cake is decorated with several lavender-colored whipped cream dollops, red heart-shaped chocolate pieces, and striped white chocolate shards. Multicolored sprinkles are scattered across the ganache surface, adding a festive touch. A large, central heart-shaped chocolate sits atop the cake, surrounded by smaller decorative elements. The overall appearance is vibrant and playful, with a focus on rich chocolate and colorful accents.
description: A round, purple cake with glossy chocolate ganache drip, topped with heart-shaped chocolates, whipped cream dollops, and colorful sprinkles.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large heart chocolate centerpiece, several lavender whipped cream dollops, and striped chocolate shards, with the chocolate drip and sprinkles clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights more of the red heart chocolates and the arrangement of whipped cream dollops, with the chocolate drip appearing slightly thicker on the left.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the distribution of the striped chocolate shards and the placement of the heart centerpiece, with the sprinkles and ganache drip still prominent.
description_view_3: This view shows the back side of the cake, with more focus on the whipped cream dollops and striped chocolate shards, and fewer heart chocolates visible.
